mapper.sql: lesson_progress_id, user_id, lesson_id, theory_completed, practice_passed, progress_rate, completed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT ulp.lesson_progress_id, ulp.user_id, ulp.lesson_id, ulp.theory_completed, ulp.practice_passed, ulp.progress_rate, ulp.completed_at, ulp.created_at, ulp.updated_at FROM user_lesson_progress ulp JOIN lessons l ON l.lesson_id = ulp.lesson_id WHERE ulp.user_id = #{userId} AND l.node_id = #{nodeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_lesson_progress (user_id, lesson_id, theory_completed, practice_passed, progress_rate) VALUES (#{userId}, #{lessonId}, 1, 0, 50.00) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE theory_completed = 1, progress_rate = IF(practice_passed = 1, 100.00, 50.00), completed_at = IF(practice_passed = 1, NOW(), completed_at), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lessons l JOIN user_lesson_progress ulp ON ulp.lesson_id = l.lesson_id AND ulp.user_id = #{userId} WHERE l.node_id = #{nodeId} AND l.is_active = 1 AND l.required_for_completion = 1 AND ulp.theory_completed = 1 AND ulp.practice_passed = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_lesson_progress ( user_id, lesson_id, theory_completed, practice_passed, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{lessonId}, 0, 1, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE practice_passed = 1, completed_at = NOW()
